supporting_quote: Tau exon 10 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN. Results are presented as percent of Tau exon 10 mRNA expression, relative to untreated control levels and is denoted as “% UTC.”
notes: Ionis. In-vitro RT-qPCR screen normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN. GAPDH appears only as a DECOY in an in-vivo mouse experiment (ratio of 4R isoform to total Tau normalized to mouse GAPDH); not the in-vitro normalizer.

supporting_quote: Gene target quantities obtained by real time RT-PCR are normalized using either the expression level of GAPDH, a gene whose expression is constant, or by quantifying total RNA using RiboGreen (Molecular Probes, Inc. Eugene, Oreg.).
notes: Early Isis (2004) real-time RT-PCR family. Primary high-throughput screen uses the standard 'either GAPDH or total RNA via RiboGreen' boilerplate without a per-result statement -> total RNA via RiboGreen per Isis default. The explicit 'Data was normalized to GAPDH levels' applies ONLY to a separate Northern-blot confirmatory assay (hybridized membranes, PHOSPHORIMAGER/IMAGEQUANT), not the qPCR inhibition screen. Medium confidence due to GAPDH/total-RNA ambiguity in the screen boilerplate.

supporting_quote: GCGR mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN. Results are presented as percent inhibition of GCGR, relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Ionis. In-vitro HepG2 RT-qPCR screen normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN. Cyclophilin A appears only in boilerplate and in an in-vivo cynomolgus monkey liver table (normalized to PBS control); not the in-vitro normalizer.

supporting_quote: Gene target quantities obtained by RT, real-time PCR were normalized using either the expression level of GAPDH, a gene whose expression is constant, or by quantifying total RNA using RiboGreen (Molecular Probes, Inc. Eugene, Oreg.).
notes: Isis. A549 in-vitro RT-qPCR screen; results 'expressed as percent inhibition relative to untreated control'. Only the generic 'either GAPDH or total RNA via RiboGreen' boilerplate is given (no per-result disambiguation), no separate Northern assay -> total RNA via RiboGreen per Isis default.
